caption: The video features an older man with gray hair and glasses, dressed in a blue shirt adorned with bird patterns and a colorful band across the chest, standing behind a podium. He appears to be giving a speech or presentation in front of an audience. The setting is indoors, with wooden paneling on the walls and a speaker visible to the left. The man is speaking into a microphone, and his expression suggests he is engaged in delivering his message. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems attentive. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event. The camera zooms in slightly, focusing more closely on the speaker as he continues his address.
